notes: US natural-gas-utility trade association. Publishes AGA standards including AGA Report No. 12 (Cryptographic Protection of SCADA Communications) — a foundational standard for SCADA-protocol authentication and encryption. Paid.

match_nodes.description: AGA 12 — Cryptographic Protection of SCADA Communications

data.official_name: AGA Report No. 12 - Cryptographic Protection of SCADA Communications
data.notes: Paid. Cryptographic protocol for SCADA traffic; defined the original AGA 12-1/12-2 SCADA cryptographic message structure.
